record.field: List sale orders / quotations with optional filters
Show recent orders List all quotations What orders came in today Show confirmed sales List orders for John
Look up a specific sale order by reference or customer
Look up order S00042 Find the order for John Smith Check quotation S00015 What's the status of order S00023
Create a new quotation / sale order
Create a quotation for John Smith New order for Jane with 2x Training Gloves Make a sale order for the Dojo Pro membership
Confirm a draft quotation into a sale order
Confirm order S00042 Approve quotation S00015 Confirm the order for John
Cancel a sale order or quotation
Cancel order S00042 Cancel the quotation for John Void order S00015
Send a quotation / sale order by email to the customer
Send order S00042 to the customer Email quotation S00015 Send the quotation for John
Show all products List merchandise What products do we sell Show services in the catalog
Look up a specific product by name or ID
Find product Training Gloves Look up the price of uniforms What's the cost of the gi Details on the Pro membership product
